SHORT NAME: PPS_CPTL 

LONG NAME: TOT_PPS_CPTL_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the total PPS capital amounts that are present on any of the claim 
records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of total PPS capital amounts reported on the claims that 
comprise the stay). 

This field is already included in the MEDPAR Medicare payment amount (field called PMT_AMT).
